reviews.review_description: Not work. Who is my pay?

Usually I am not writing reviews however I cannot skip this particular opportunity. In my understanding this is how proper VR experience should look like. Great creativity, thoughtfulness, attention to details and variety of options within one app. I cannot imagine any fan of rollecoasters or rides who would not enjoy this app. What I will say next is not critics but constructive suggestions (because I care): Splash is absolute masterpiece, i loved how chair tilts - totally immersive experience, could be enhanced with bumps into rocks. Also few more seconds when dock back to a pier would add sense of reality when exit the ride (app turned off while we are still nearly docked but not docked). In Superhero what would be really strong VR experience is more shutters when breaking thru windows - in current version shutters look too simple, not realistic. Shooting game is okay but was least preferred, who wants the ride would not care much for this. Also beginning of each ride would look better if we enter different gates in the park rather than clicking in the menu (this reduces reality effect). All this is just small things, overall it is amazing experience, i liked it even more than I imagined I would. I installed this app based on reviews I read in comments, and I was NOT disappointed. Thank you!

developer_response.body: Hey appreciate the time for the feedback and great suggestions. So glad you are enjoying the rides !

reviews.review_description: Brilliant, really good fun, love it

developer_response.body: Hey thanks for letting us know you're enjoying the game !

reviews.review_description: I think updates are a big improvement. 1 small issue whenever i try to usegear vr controller in your app, i have bad buzzing and sound distortions. Using S8 plus. Its fine when i turn off bluetooth. Anyway love your park. Super excited for phase 2

developer_response.body:
Hi,
Thanks for the feedback and so glad you are enjoying the rides. Very strange about the issue you are having on your phone as we have not had another report of this. The app was also been tested by Oculus and ourselves and this did not show up in any testing. To be sure though, we retested the latest updated version on the S8 just now with controller and cannot replicate the buzzing you mention :(. If you email us at service@exvrience.com we can try and assist further though.

reviews.review_description:
Love the big variety of rides, incredibly creative, and the graphics are solid at least. Superhero was my favorite, although going inside the castle in Dragon Dome was the most immersive. The motion intensity is VERY high- I think due to very sharply banked turns, especially on Dragon Dome and Ghost Mine, and also continually going in circles on Splashdown. Making the turns more gentle, and less circling on Splashdown would help.

Suggestions- more close-ups like the ghost riding on the side of your cart- great! Animate the water on Dragon Dome. Didn't care much for shooting gallery. Maybe a big drop ride? Or a boat ride like Pirates of the Caribbean. Great job guys!
EDIT: Log ride or natural disaster ride would be fun too!

developer_response.body:
Hi,
Thanks for the great feedback and all your suggestions, we really appreciate it. Especially the log ride and natural disaster, we think we could do something really cool with them.

reviews.review_description: Easily one of the best, and I can't wait for more. Have you all considered doing a pendulum/swing type ride in the future? I don't think I've seen one yet and I'm sure you'd make a great one.

developer_response.body:
Hi,
That's great, glad your enjoying the park. Thanks for the suggestion of the swing ride. At the moment we are looking at adding something extra into Stage 1 so stay tuned!

reviews.review_description: Everything was off the chain it seems so real can't wait for the dinosaurs one and iam ready for new updates

developer_response.body: Fantastic! Glad you liked it. We will continue to enhance the rides based on feedback whilst we build Stage 2. Thanks for your review.

reviews.review_description: Good experience  but when will new ride be available

Omg loved it,  Not for the faint at heart,  will give a person motion sickness if they can't take movement.  I loved it so real the amusement park is cool.  You guys ROCK can't wait for the dinosaurs. 10 starts

developer_response.body: Thanks for the great feedback.  The rides run at a very high frame rate so the motion should be ok for most. Glad you are enjoying it :)

reviews.review_description: It's kinda boring, I don't see any point coming back to it again, uninstalled.

This is something apart from other "normal" coaster where you ride a track. The Superman ride has you flying through a city, the Dragon Dome ride sees you as a wizard riding your broomstick chasing a dragon around a castle, Glide has you parasailing in the sky around hot air balloons and floating islands in the skies. The graphics are nice and the general feel of it is very satisfying. On sale for €2, this is a *must have* item.

developer_response.body: Hi, Thanks for the great feedback. Our aim was to make this a bit different from other roller coaster apps and more of a theme park experience.

reviews.review_description: I'm installing all day.  The application does not start.  Other applications work.  Samsung galaxy note 8

developer_response.body: Hi, Oculus have tested installation on all devices as working. Could you please ensure you have enough space as it is a big app? If that does not work, you can log a support ticket with Oculus who will be able to help you through this link https://tickets.oculusvr.com/hc/en-us/requests/new

reviews.review_description: Every ride in this game is outstanding!!  The developers did an amazing job on this game and I’m really looking forward to new rides.  Definitely worth the price!
It was imaginative, I'm 57 and had to stop the ride because I felt sick.
Not too bad or good. The rides are not notable but the graphics are somewhat good.
Graphics could be a a smidge clearer. And maybe make it a little more interesting because it really wasnt woth the money other then there being multiple rides. So i guess its decent but meh

developer_response.body: Hey, thanks for the review. Keen to hear what extras you would like to see to make the theme park more interesting for you.

reviews.review_description: The shooting was ok, but everything else just seemed very boring and pointless.

developer_response.body: Hi Ken, thanks for taking the time to provide feedback. It's interesting the different opinions people have on the theme park. Some people absolutely love the rides but don't like the shooting which was obviously different in your case.
